Trafalgar.text:
Wind
In southeast, variable 2 to 4, but south 3 to 5 at times. In northwest, southerly or southwesterly 4 to 6, increasing 7 at times.
Sea state
In southeast, moderate, occasionally slight later. in northwest, moderate or rough, becoming rough or very rough later.
Weather
In southeast, fair . In northwest, rain or showers.
Visibility
In southeast, moderate or good, occasionally poor at first. In northwest, good, occasionally poor.
